Name: complete
Steps: Set `completedAt` → current time; Set `outcome` → `$request.outcome`; Set `completionNotes` → `$request.notes`; Emit `completed` event; Invoke `workflow/tasks`

Name: release
Steps: Set `assignedToId` → nothing *(clears field)*; Emit `released` event; Evaluate `assignment-rule`; Evaluate `priority-rule`

Name: escalate
Steps: Set `escalatedAt` → current time; Evaluate `priority-rule`; Emit `escalated` event

Name: escalate
Steps: Set `escalatedAt` → current time; Evaluate `priority-rule`; Emit `escalated` event

Name: reopen
Steps: Set `cancelledAt` → nothing *(clears field)*; Evaluate `assignment-rule`; Evaluate `priority-rule`; Emit `reopened` event

Name: approve
Steps: Set `completedAt` → current time; Set `outcome` → `$request.outcome`; Set `completionNotes` → `$request.notes`; Emit `approved` event

Name: assign
From: pending | in_progress | escalated | awaiting_client | awaiting_verification | pending_review

Name: set-priority
From: pending | in_progress | escalated | awaiting_client | awaiting_verification | pending_review
